title: dianthus longivaginatus
intro: Dianthus longivaginatus, also known as the long-spurred pink or the Chinese pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dianthus longivaginatus include its ability to treat skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and wounds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Dianthus longivaginatus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
